name: Quality Gate
overview: Restrict users to specific media versions based on configurable path-based policies.
description: Quality Gate allows Jellyfin administrators to define policies that restrict certain users to specific media versions. This is useful for scenarios where you have both high-quality original files and lower-bitrate transcoded versions, and want to limit some users to only the transcoded versions to save bandwidth or manage access.

versions.changelog: Fixed configuration UI - buttons and dropdowns now work properly.
